overall.description: Gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a character walking along a city sidewalk. The journey begins under a highway overpass in shadow, transitions into bright sunlight past street vendors, and continues toward an elevated transit bridge with mountains visible in the distance. The scene features futuristic architecture, digital billboards, and light pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing runs toward camera and passes by on the right
exiting the shadow of the overpass into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the concrete overpass

notable_agents.action: character runs toward the camera and passes by quickly

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass creating shadow overhead
low concrete wall with metal railings separating walkway from lower area
tall glass building with colorful digital signage near the top

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass in a futuristic city. The camera moves forward along a shaded sidewalk next to a road, passing concrete barriers on the left. A pedestrian runs toward and past the camera around the 7-second mark. The environment transitions from shadow to bright sunlight as the overpass ends.

scene_state.functional_zone: open city sidewalk with street vendors and industrial buildings

events.description: green sports car drives past on the right side road
passing yellow vendor stall with market umbrellas on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sunlit sidewalk past parked vehicles and street vendors

notable_agents.action: green sports car speeding past on the multi-lane road
vendor standing beside yellow market stall with goods displayed

entered.detail: low-rise industrial structure with steam vents and metal scaffolding
large illuminated advertisement showing purple and white graphics
street vendor setup with yellow umbrella and sandbag barriers

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the overpass into bright sunlight, revealing a bustling city street. The futuristic skyscraper with digital billboards dominates the view ahead. The camera passes by an orange industrial building on the right with steam vents, and a yellow street vendor stall on the left. Vehicles including a green sports car drive past on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban promenade approaching elevated transit bridge

events.description: pedestrian in blue outfit walks past the camera on the right side
approaching the large elevated transit bridge structure spanning the road ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward the distant bridge structure with mountains visible in the background

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue work clothes walking past on the right

entered.detail: large concrete and steel monorail or highway structure spanning across the road ahead
distant hills and mountains visible beyond the city buildings
row of concrete seating along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows an open, sunlit promenade with the camera moving toward a massive elevated transit bridge in the distance. Mountains are visible on the horizon beyond the city. The yellow vendor stall and orange building fall behind as the camera passes concrete benches on the left. A pedestrian in blue clothing walks past on the right, and the futuristic skyscraper shifts to the right side of the frame as the camera advances.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the cool shadows of a concrete overpass into a bright, expansive futuristic cityscape. It begins beneath a massive highway structure, gliding along a shaded sidewalk past concrete barriers as a pedestrian runs across the path. As the camera emerges from the shadow into brilliant sunlight, the view opens up to reveal a bustling street featuring a towering skyscraper with digital billboards, an orange industrial building with steam vents, and a yellow vendor stall. The scene then shifts toward an open promenade, passing concrete benches and a pedestrian in blue while a green sports car drives by on the adjacent road. Finally, the camera advances toward a massive elevated transit bridge, with the city skyline shifting to the side to reveal distant mountains on the horizon.
